<div class="section-outer section-blue">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">Before the workshop, install the tools below to follow along hands-on.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-3">
  <div class="section-sub">Extensive</div>
  <a class="section-card" href="installation.html#essentials">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="package-check"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Essentials</div>
  </a>
  <a class="section-card" href="installation.html#agents">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="bot"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Agents</div>
  </a>
  <a class="section-card" href="installation.html#software">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="app-window"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Software</div>
  </a>
 </div>
</div>
